'''''Clone Strike''''' was the second set released for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game. Released on December 13, 2004, it featured 60 figures from the [[prequel trilogy]] era. As with its predecessor, [[Rebel Storm (Star Wars Miniatures)|Rebel Storm]], miniatures could be purchased in a booster pack of 7 random minis, or in a starter set, containing 8 random minis, as well as [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|General Kenobi]] and [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], an updated rulebook, and a map ([[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]).

===Ultimate Missions===
On March 16, 2005, Wizards released ''[[Ultimate Missions: Clone Strike]]'', a book featuring 36 scenarios based on ''Clone Strike'' characters, as well as two maps ([[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]) and map tiles.
